issues.description: Rest action targets own DON!! cards, not own Characters. Should use scope 'ChooseOwnDon' or similar, not 'ChooseOwnCharacter'
ReturnToHand targets own Characters with cost 2 or less, not opponent Characters. Should be 'ChooseOwnCharacter' with maxCost constraint, not 'ChooseOpponentCharacter'
Effect is conditional on 'You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards' - this is an optional cost, not a mandatory action. Structure should reflect optional activation and conditional execution
